_comment: BUNDLED engine-pack catalog. EngineRegistry.fetch_catalog() serves this list when no remote catalog_url is configured, so 'Add engines' works with zero hosting. Every pack is DATA ONLY (a .nnue evaluation network + optional UCI overrides) executed by the Stockfish binary already compiled into the app - App Store Guideline 2.5.2 compliant, no executable code is ever downloaded. net_url points straight at Stockfish's own public net server; size_bytes + sha256 are validated before a net is installed. ONLY list nets verified to load in THIS build (arch 22528x128x15x32x1, see gdextension/src/stockfish_smoke.cpp: ./stockfish_smoke <net.nnue> must print bestmove).

packs.name: Classic Net
packs.author: The Stockfish team · GPLv3
packs.description: Stockfish's previous-generation net — a subtly different positional style. ~3.3 MB, downloads once then works fully offline.
